name: Heart Rate Zones Calculator
seo_title: Heart Rate Training Zones – Fast & Accurate
seo_description: Use our free heart rate training zones to quickly estimate zone1, zone2 based on age. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate HR zones for 30 year old.
result_context: Zona 1-2 es quema of grasa, Zona 3-4 es cardio, Zona 5 es anaeróbico maximum to intervalos.
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que age estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online heart rate training zones. Enter age to get instant results.
